text.title: Terraform Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-monorepo-layout
step.action: Create envs/<env>/ + modules/<name>/. Configure versions.tf with pins.

step.name: configure-remote-backend
step.input: S3 bucket + DynamoDB table (or TF Cloud workspace)
step.action: terraform init with backend config. Migrate any local state.
step.note: Gate: If lock table missing, STOP — create it first.

step.name: wire-ci-apply
step.action: Add plan-on-PR + apply-on-merge. Configure OIDC trust to cloud IAM.

step.name: extract-modules
step.action: Extract shared patterns to modules/. Tag semver. Replace inline copies.

step.name: enable-drift-detection
step.action: Add weekly cron job: terraform plan per env. Surface drift to triage channel.
